name: Bulldocks: Review Alert (5★ Wins)
description: Alert on 5-star reviews in real-time, celebrate wins in #wins channel

arguments.message: Vielen Dank für die 5-Sterne-Bewertung! 🎉 Wir freuen uns, dass dir Bulldocks gefällt. Viel Erfolg beim Dartspiel! — Mashl

parameters.columns: review_id, rating, reviewer_name, review_text, order_id, created_at

notes:
SETUP STEPS:
1. Create Etsy webhook:
   - Go to https://developers.etsy.com/
   - Create webhook subscription for 'review.created' event
   - Point webhook URL to: https://your-n8n-domain.com/webhook/bulldocks/review-webhook
2. Test webhook payload (Etsy provides sample)
3. Enable auto-reply step (optional, can be manual)
4. Configure #wins channel
5. Enable workflow

WEBHOOK SECURITY:
- Verify webhook signature (Etsy provides HMAC)
- Store webhook secret in n8n env variable
- Rate limit: 1 webhook per review (Etsy guarantees once-delivery)

OPTIONAL ENHANCEMENTS:
- Filter for 'long reviews' (e.g., >50 chars) = deeper engagement
- Extract keywords from review_text (e.g., 'installation', 'quality')
- Trend analysis: 5★ rate by product/variant
